title: AAR: Dynasty Recruiting & Signing Pipeline Fix
scope: Fix two layered bugs: the interactive offseason API never produced phased-signing data (Signing Day Tracker rendered empty), and signed recruits never converted into PlayerCards on next year's roster while graduating seniors stayed on as zombies.

rationale.item: Player report: 'I just did a whole dynasty season and the recruiting isn't working — no one is signing at all early, middle, or late. And those same players don't appear on the rosters the following year.'

delegation_events.decision: Use phased signing in the API path instead of bridging to Dynasty.run_offseason to avoid double-running subsystems
delegation_events.quote: Routing the API through run_offseason would double-run those subsystems. Replacing the single-pass signing call was a one-line swap; the rest is the same plumbing the auto path uses.

delegation_events.decision: Drop graduates in offseason_complete rather than at season end — happens once, immediately before _next_season_rosters is serialized
delegation_events.quote: The 'drop them from the roster' step needs to happen exactly once, immediately before _next_season_rosters is serialized — which is what offseason_complete is for.

delegation_events.decision: Use +4 baseline scholarship instead of computing from real roster size because _roster_maintenance always backfills to 36
delegation_events.quote: A future improvement could thread real scholarship counts (rather than headcount) through, but that's a larger refactor and not what the player was complaining about.

delegation_events.decision: Fix the human_team NameError even though no live UI hits that path
delegation_events.quote: Tests, batch_sim, and any future commissioner-style automation will hit it. It's a one-line change with zero risk and removes a trip wire.

actions.description: Switch offseason_recruiting_resolve to phased signing (simulate_phased_signing), write phase_summary/signing_log to dynasty.recruiting_history
offseason_complete: drop graduates, convert signed recruits to Freshman PlayerCards, clear _pending_signed_recruits
Dynasty.run_offseason: move human_team assignment to top of method; raise scholarship floor to max(6, min(12, grads+portal_losses-portal_adds+4))

validation_claims.claim: End-to-end repro: early 25 signings, regular 14 signings, post_bowl 3 signings. After offseason_complete: Alabama 31 players 11 Freshman 0 Graduate signed-on-roster 2/2; Auburn 33 players 12 Freshman; Arkansas 35 players 18 Freshman. All 43 signed recruits appear on next season's rosters. All graduates removed.
validation_claims.check_method: Run offseason pipeline end-to-end with 8 SEC teams and verify recruit count in next season's rosters

validation_claims.claim: test_recruiting.py still passes 11/12 (failing test_roster_prestige_estimation is a pre-existing portal-prestige issue, unrelated to signing)
validation_claims.check_method: Run pytest test_recruiting.py and verify 11/12 pass

non_actions.item: No class-year advancement on the API offseason path
non_actions.reason: Dynasty.advance_season does call apply_team_development (which advances years), so the cards arriving at offseason already have the correct years. But there's no second-stage development applied during the offseason itself the way Dynasty.run_offseason does. Out of scope for this fix.

non_actions.item: No fallback backfill for short rosters on API path
non_actions.reason: If a team's churn exceeds its signing class plus walk-ons, the roster will be under 36 next year. _roster_maintenance handles this in the auto path; the API path doesn't yet.

non_actions.item: Walk-ons not generated by API resolve
non_actions.reason: simulate_phased_signing returns the unsigned pool; the API doesn't currently route those through assign_walkon_players. The walkons dict in recruiting_history is always empty.

residual_risks: Walk-ons never generated on API offseason path; walkons dict always empty
Short roster fallback not implemented on API path
section_headers_original: AAR: Dynasty Recruiting & Signing Pipeline Fix
1. Signing Tracker showed "No signings recorded" for every phase
2. Signed recruits never appeared on the next season's roster
3. Scholarship math collapsed to the floor
Why phased signing in the API path instead of bridging to Dynasty.run_offseason?
Why drop graduates in offseason_complete rather than at season end?
Why a +4 baseline scholarship instead of computing from real roster size?
Why fix the human_team NameError if no live UI hits that path?
unmapped_content: Date in subtitle 'April 2026' with no specific day; filename says 2026-04-24 but not confirmed in document body. Using null. Commits: a3d90b9 — Fix dynasty recruiting showing zero signings in early/regular/post_bowl; 9c43d60 — Apply signed recruits + drop graduates in offseason_complete. Interaction with Other Systems: Signing Day Tracker now reads real phase_summary; Recruit Profile pages fallback to recruiting_history.signing_log; Class Rankings exclude walk-ons from average-stars calc; Transfer Portal unchanged; HS Recruiting Pipeline unchanged. Scholarship formula code block verbatim: open_spots = max(6, min(12, grads + portal_losses - portal_adds + 4)).
